Class ClientServiceImpl

java.lang.Object

All Implemented Interfaces:

  • Method Details

    • addClient

      public ClientResponseDto addClient(ClientRequestDto clientRequestDto) throws ClientException
      Add a client.
      Specified by:
      addClient in interface ClientService
      Parameters:
      clientRequestDto - information of client to create.
      Returns:
      the client created in the form of clientResponseDto.
      Throws:
      ClientException - if data is invalid or client's mail already exist.

    • findAllClients

      public List<ClientResponseDto> findAllClients()
      List all clients.
      Specified by:
      findAllClients in interface ClientService
      Returns:
      list of all clients in the form of clientResponseDto.

    • findByMail

      public ClientResponseDto findByMail(String mail) throws jakarta.persistence.EntityNotFoundException
      Find client by filling his mail.
      Specified by:
      findByMail in interface ClientService
      Parameters:
      mail - client's mail.
      Returns:
      the client in the form of clientResponseDto.
      Throws:
      jakarta.persistence.EntityNotFoundException

    • patchByMail

      public ClientResponseDto patchByMail(String mail, ClientPatchRequestDto clientPatchRequestDto)
      Patch client by filling his mail.
      Specified by:
      patchByMail in interface ClientService
      Parameters:
      mail - client's mail.
      clientPatchRequestDto - new client's attributes.
      Returns:
      the client in the form of clientResponseDto.

      Verify all client's attributes.
      Specified by:

      clientRequestDto - information of client to create.
